Click 'Calculate dates' to recalculate t: Click 'Calculate usukus' to recalculate the start and end usukus of a parent-level incazelo. Record a citation to, and/or information: Irekhodi a citation to, and/or information about a publication that is about or based on the use, study, or analysis of the unit of incazelo. Include references to published facsimiles or transcriptions. (ISAD 3.5.4)
Record a citation to, or information abo: Irekhodi a citation to, or information about, a publication that is about or is based on the use, study, or analysis of the materials being described. Provide sufficient information to indicate the relationship between the publication and the unit being described. This includes annotated editions. (DACS 6.4.4)
Record notes on sources consulted in pre: Irekhodi notes on sources consulted in preparing the incazelo and who prepared it. (ISAD 3.7.1)
Record specialized or other important in: Irekhodi specialized or other important information not accommousukud by any of the defined elements of incazelo. (ISAD 3.6.1)
Record the name of the register which gr: Irekhodi the ibizo of the register which group this archival material (Audio visual, sound, maniscripts and photographs as an example). Dinga for an existing ibizo in the registry amarekhodi by typing the first few characters of the ibizo. Alternatively, request for a new registry entry to be created. NARSSA Act 1996

Record, as needed, information not accom: Irekhodi, as needed, information not accommousukud by any of the defined elements of incazelo. (DACS 7.1.2)
